arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss details midfield thinking as he prepares to welcome £50,000-a-week Newcastle United man
arts.sum: John Mousinho has welcomed the prospect of landing the ‘right player’ to bolster his midfield as Pompey get set to announce Isaac Hayden’s arrival.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth have reached flash agreement to sell player in permanent transfer
arts.sum: Elias Sørensen is set to leave Portsmouth for Vålerenga Fotball in the winter market. That’s according to Tipsbladet, who state Portsmouth have agreed a deal with the Norwegian club for the striker’s permanent transfer. It’s claimed John Mousinho’s side invested €300,000 to buy the 25-year-old from Esbjerg fB in the summer. arts.ttl: Portsmouth forced into transfer window rethink after fresh injury blow
arts.sum: Pompey are weighing up recruiting another left-back following Jacob Farrell’s latest injury blow.

arts.ttl: LATEST: News on Portsmouth’s interest in ‘teenage sensation’ as transfer picture with Sheffield Wednesday and QPR develops
arts.sum: Pompey are exploring a potential deal for Thomas Waddingham in the January window.
